name: Whale Flex (土豪开箱)
logic_steps: Mandatory Execution: Cold open into an inventory with 999,999 premium currency.
Show extreme purchasing power: instantly completing upgrades or buying out the whole shop.
Visuals should be completely flooded with gold, epic rarity colors (orange/purple) and massive damage numbers.
Subtitles focus on 'Admin power' or 'Hacker-like wealth'.
